title: f/prompts.chat
summary: prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，专注于收集、分享和发现来自社区的 ChatGPT 提示词。它支持自托管，确保组织隐私，并涵盖了多种 AI 模型如 GPT-4、Claude 和 Gemini。该项目使用 Next.js 和 TypeScript 构建，拥有超过 16 万星标，是提示工程领域的重要资源。
summary_en: prompts.chat is an open-source project focused on sharing, discovering, and collecting ChatGPT prompts from the community. It supports self-hosting for complete privacy and covers various AI models like GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini. Built with Next.js and TypeScript, it has over 166k stars, making it a key resource in prompt engineering.
